title: ophrys passionis subsp. pseudoatrata
intro: Ophrys passionis subsp. pseudoatrata, commonly known as the Bee Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Ophrys. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Ophrys passionis subsp. pseudoatrata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by infusing the flowers in hot water to make a tea, or by using it in herbal tinctures and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
